description: Add grade-specific Peraturan & Prosedur for Perjalanan Dinas. Replace the static prosedur content in the 'Prosedur' tab with grade-tailored rules showing each employee their specific entitlements, approval flow requirements, and policies. Integrate this into both the admin Perjalanan Dinas view and each employee's portal.
steps: Step 1: Create a PERATURAN_DINAS_BY_GRADE constant (in modules.js near the BENEFIT_CONFIG_BY_GRADE from FEAT-001) that defines per-grade rules including: (a) approval flow (e.g., STAFF needs Head + HRD approval, HEAD needs BOD approval), (b) max trip duration allowed without special approval, (c) allowed transport modes (e.g., STAFF gets bus/train, HEAD gets plane economy, BOD gets plane business), (d) allowed hotel classes, (e) advance payment percentage allowed, (f) reporting deadline, (g) any special privileges. Use Indonesian language for all labels.

Step 2: Modify the loadSPPDProsedur(el) function to: (a) Detect the current user's grade using getUserGrade(), (b) Display a personalized header showing 'Prosedur untuk Grade: [GRADE]', (c) Show the general procedure steps (keep existing numbered steps), (d) Add a new section below titled 'Ketentuan Berdasarkan Grade Anda' showing the grade-specific rules from PERATURAN_DINAS_BY_GRADE in a well-formatted card with icons, (e) Show a comparison table of all grades' entitlements so users understand the tier system (with their own grade highlighted).

Step 3: Add an admin-facing 'Konfigurasi Benefit Grade' section accessible from the prosedur tab when user hasAccess(3). This shows an editable table of all grade configs allowing admin to view (read-only display for now) the grade benefit matrix - all grades side by side in a comparison table.

Step 4: Update renderPortalPeraturan() to include a new section at the top or after the general company rules titled 'Ketentuan Perjalanan Dinas - Grade [USER_GRADE]' showing the personalized travel rules and benefit entitlements for the logged-in employee's grade. This section should clearly display: allowed transport, hotel class, daily allowance, meal budget, and the approval flow they must follow.

Step 5: In the portal Perjalanan Dinas page, add a dismissible info banner at the top (before the tabs) that summarizes key policies for the user's grade: 'Sebagai grade [X], Anda berhak atas: [uang harian], [kelas hotel], [transport]. Ajukan SPPD minimal 3 hari sebelum keberangkatan.'
acceptance_criteria: PERATURAN_DINAS_BY_GRADE constant exists with rules for at least 4 grade tiers
The Prosedur tab shows personalized rules based on the current user's grade
A comparison table of all grades' entitlements is shown with the user's grade highlighted
Admin users (hasAccess(3)) can see the full grade benefit matrix
The portal Peraturan page includes a Perjalanan Dinas section tailored to the user's grade
The portal Perjalanan Dinas page shows an info banner with the user's grade-specific entitlements
All text is in Indonesian language matching existing app conventions
All JS files pass syntax check (node --check)
